cacheItem.title: @teortaxesTex: You know, looking at how V4-Flash (13BA) just keeps going, building from scratch

payload.title: @teortaxesTex: You know, looking at how V4-Flash (13BA) just keeps going, building from scratch
payload.text: You know, looking at how V4-Flash (13BA) just keeps going, building from scratch a fairly complex app, trying things, 270K tokens, 275K… Attention really was the magic trick, huh? We just had to keep chipping off the excess bulk of the MHA Vaswanisaur, for many long years.

You know, looking at how V4-Flash (13BA) just keeps going, building from scratch a fairly complex app, trying things, 270K tokens, 275K… Attention really was the magic trick, huh? We just had to keep chipping off the excess bulk of the MHA Vaswanisaur, for many long years.

Replying to @teortaxesTex
Vaswani et. al (2017) after a new Transformer Killer paper drops
«So what're your gimmicks? Better scaling law? Subquadratic complexity? O(1) memory? Modeling problems higher on Chomsky Hierarchy? It's laudable how far you pests can go… Even without having EVERYTHING AT HAND»

textCapture.visibleText: You know, looking at how V4-Flash (13BA) just keeps going, building from scratch a fairly complex app, trying things, 270K tokens, 275K… Attention really was the magic trick, huh? We just had to keep chipping off the excess bulk of the MHA Vaswanisaur, for many long years.
